{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160427A4B68C47DFEB98B7B1E7"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606227346286625560","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到23章目前感觉安排的还是不错的，期待汇入各个漫威大事件还有X的剧情以及后续的新游戏内容"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770966291,"group_id":"7599302990536641561","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxaxfnuoQo2F/SN98t4OuC0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"88681315999","user_name":"喜欢康佳鼓的多格雅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"88681315999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599302990536641561","book_info":{"abstract":"李煌灵穿越了，带着一个能抽取诸天万界的游戏系统。
第一月，【一人之下】。神格面具、拘灵遣将——异人世界的力量在他体内觉醒。
第二月，【SAO】。半数据化特性、数据之眼、极限破境——虚拟与现实开始交融。
但他所在的，是漫威电影宇宙。
这里有九头蛇的阴影，有神盾局的监控，有即将到来的灭霸响指，有无数超级英雄与反派交织的命运。
有人问他：你要当超级英雄？
他笑了。
当英雄？不。
他要当的是——规则制定者。
手合会倒了，高夫人G了，夜魔侠成了他的战友，艾丽卡成了他的女人。
神盾局想招安？九头蛇想拉拢？先排队。
金并派人来摸底？靶眼跃跃欲试？欢迎来送。
他在唐人街的武馆里，悄悄拉起了一支队伍——盲人律师、冷血杀手、高米迪，还有大洋彼岸送来的两个“惊喜”。
他在自己的数据世界里，开辟了无限乐园——苏鲁豫皖的普通人，正在1851年的金田村参加起义；纽约州的玩家，正在硫磺岛的炮火中挣扎求生。
有人说他疯了。
有人说他是圣子再世。
有人跪下来喊他义父。
李煌灵站在振华武馆三楼的窗边，看着纽约的夜色，嘴角微微勾起。
群魔诸神并起？
苍生苦楚难渡？
无所谓。
他会出手。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/86d0afed5b62ffab7d8e5e52140294e9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"林中雾鸦","author_id":"","book_id":"7599302990536641561","book_name":"美漫：我的诸天游戏盒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4819人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599303086821081625","read_count":"4819","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"343404"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"121","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,魂穿,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/86d0afed5b62ffab7d8e5e52140294e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437067&x-signature=wRdyRyGfMp2roFiJoDcxkShfEYc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2357003376400622","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160427A4B68C47DFEB98B7B1E7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d 当英雄？不。
他要当的是——规则制定者。
手合会倒了，高夫人G了，夜魔侠成了他的战友，艾丽卡成了他的女人。
神盾局想招安？九头蛇想拉拢？先排队。
金并派人来摸底？靶眼跃跃欲试？欢迎来送。
他在唐人街的武馆里，悄悄拉起了一支队伍——盲人律师、冷血杀手、高米迪，还有大洋彼岸送来的两个“惊喜”。

有人说他是圣子再世。
有人跪下来喊他义父。
